name: replicate-model-runner
description: Search public Replicate models, then run any chosen model from a local script and save outputs locally.

interface.shortDescription: Search Replicate models and run them locally
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled local scripts to search public Replicate models for a task, then execute any chosen model from a model slug plus JSON input. Generated files are saved into the workspace with the raw prediction payload for reproducibility.
defaultPrompt: Search Replicate for fast image models with strong text rendering
Run black-forest-labs/flux-schnell with this prompt and save the image
Run prunaai/p-image with this JSON input and save the output files
